description: A high-resolution SPOT-5 satellite image, dated 2011-11-27, shows an example of an Anatolian steppe near Sultanhanı, south of Tuz Lake, Turkey. The imagery, with a 2.5 m resolution, uses an infrared band combination. Drier areas exhibit green-brown colours, while montane steppes with more active vegetation appear green. Some reddish patches are also visible, consistent with infrared band combinations for land cover analysis. A bright green polygonal line delineates a boundary on the left side of the image, and a small, bright green circular marker is centrally located within the image. The image source is CNES 2012©, distributed by Airbus DS/Spot Image.
